name: github-package-visualizer
description: Browse the contents of npm or GitHub Registry packages

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c cyan,green "pnpm --filter server dev" "pnpm --filter client dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter server build && pnpm --filter client build
scripts.dev:vscode: concurrently -n ext,webview -c magenta,yellow "pnpm --filter github-package-visualizer-vscode watch" "pnpm --filter github-package-visualizer-vscode watch:webview"
